title: [Nemuri] Uesaka Sumire 上坂すみれ (2013-2024) Discography / Collection [23 CDs] [MP3]
description:
[Nemuri] Uesaka Sumire 上坂すみれ (2013-2024) Discography / Collection [23 CDs] [MP3]

***Every of my torrent comes from original CDs that I have bought or that my friends lent me. As for the ones that are only digitally released, you’ll find them cataloged exactly like the ones I purchased physically. If you check my torrents and you don’t find an artist or anime you are looking for, it means that nether I or my friends currently have those CDs; for this reason I don’t create discographies on commission, I’m sorry. If you find any errors or oversights, please let me know; they will be corrected at the next torrent’s update. Thank you for your collaboration.***

Ver. [2024.08.25]
- [2024.07.24] 上坂すみれ｜SUMIRE CATALOG
- [2016.08.03] 上坂すみれ｜恋する図形 (cubic futurismo) ***new version***
- [2013.07.10] 上坂すみれ｜げんし、女子は、たいようだった。***new version***
- Fixed some typos and inaccuracies from the latest version of this torrent.
- Your contribution in this respect was very important. Thank you.

Ver. [2024.03.03]
- [2024.02.07] 上坂すみれ｜ディア・パンタレイ

--- ***What is an ERA?*** ---
Sometimes a ***seiyū*** releases such a number of CDs during her career that it may be difficult not to get lost. Therefore, for this collection and for the others you will find in my account, I decided to catalog the CDs into “ERAs”. Musically speaking, an “ERA” is composed of all CDs (***singles*** or ***mini-album***) that precede the release of an ***album*** which, usually, includes some or all of the songs on those records. When the album is released, an ERA ends and a new one begins starting from the next single. Every ERA is named after the title of the album and, normally, gathers songs that are not present in previous ERAs, nor will be in future ones. If you see an ERA in my collections that does not have a title, but only a numerical indicator, it means that the album that concludes it has not yet been released.

NOTE: In the comments section of each file I wrote “Ripped by Nemuri & Menelkir” because all of the collections I upload are created together with Menelkir (which was also the name of our old NYAA account before the site suddenly closed in 2017). Even today you can find here some torrents signed [Menelkir]; however, those torrents are managed by NYAA itself, and are obsolete versions without seeds. If you want to contact me: nemuri.nyaa@gmail.com

title: [Nemuri] Tadokoro Azusa 田所あずさ (2014-2024) Discography / Collection [19 CDs] [MP3]
description:
[Nemuri] Tadokoro Azusa 田所あずさ (2014-2024) Discography / Collection [19 CDs] [MP3]

***Every of my torrent comes from original CDs that I have bought or that my friends lent me. As for the ones that are only digitally released, you’ll find them cataloged exactly like the ones I purchased physically. If you check my torrents and you don’t find an artist or anime you are looking for, it means that nether I or my friends currently have those CDs; for this reason I don’t create discographies on commission, I’m sorry. If you find any errors or oversights, please let me know; they will be corrected at the next torrent’s update. Thank you for your collaboration.***

Ver. [2024.08.25]
- [2024.07.30] 田所あずさ｜Ivory

Ver. [2023.10.27]
- [2023.07.04] 田所あずさ｜プライベート・ルーム

Ver. [2023.02.23]
- [2023.01.09] 田所あずさ｜ドラム式探査機

Ver. [2022. 01.15]
- [2022.01.05] 田所あずさ｜箱庭の幸福

--- ***What is an ERA?*** ---
Sometimes a ***seiyū*** releases such a number of CDs during her career that it may be difficult not to get lost. Therefore, for this collection and for the others you will find in my account, I decided to catalog the CDs into “ERAs”. Musically speaking, an “ERA” is composed of all CDs (***singles*** or ***mini-album***) that precede the release of an ***album*** which, usually, includes some or all of the songs on those records. When the album is released, an ERA ends and a new one begins starting from the next single. Every ERA is named after the title of the album and, normally, gathers songs that are not present in previous ERAs, nor will be in future ones. If you see an ERA in my collections that does not have a title, but only a numerical indicator, it means that the album that concludes it has not yet been released.

田所あずさ ***Tadokoro Azusa*** is a seiyuu and singer affiliated with Horipro. She is the grand prix winner of ***Horipro's 36th Talent Scout Caravan.***
- Official Website : https://www.lantis.jp/artist/tadokoroazusa/
- Official Twitter : https://twitter.com/AzusaTadokoro
- Official Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/azusa_tadokoro/
- Official Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/tadokoroazusaofficial

NOTE: In the comments section of each file I wrote “Ripped by Nemuri & Menelkir” because all of the collections I upload are created together with Menelkir (which was also the name of our old NYAA account before the site suddenly closed in 2017). Even today you can find here some torrents signed [Menelkir]; however, those torrents are managed by NYAA itself, and are obsolete versions without seeds. If you want to contact me: nemuri.nyaa@gmail.com

title: [VCB-Studio] 迷家 / Mayoiga / マヨイガ 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [Fin]
description:
![](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/08/25/mayoiga_800.webp)  
  
迷家 / Mayoiga / マヨイガ BDRip  
部分剧集内封评论音轨。  
Some episodes contain commentary tracks.  
  
随着抽象巨制《终末列车要开往哪里？》的热播，不禁让人想起水岛努监督在 8 年前编导的这部魔幻大作，于是趁势就制作了本片。  
原盘画质一般，大部分场景原生分辨率 719.8p，OP 部分为 720p。全片线条偏糊，有明显锯齿，暗场有不少色带，噪点质量也很一般，尤其是线条周围有一些蚊噪。考虑到背景也很糊，而且暗场偏多，因此我们稍微提高了降噪和去色带时的强度。除此之外就是一些常规操作：逆向拉升重构、抗锯齿、补偿性锐化。最后我们重构了噪点层以提升观感。  
As the surreal anime Shuumatsu Train Doko e Iku? gains popularity, it's time to revisit this 8-year-old "masterpiece" also produced by Mizushima Tsutomu.  
The Blu-ray source quality is mediocre. Most of the scenes have a native resolution of 719.8p, except the OP which has 720p instead. The lines look blurry throughout the series, and aliasing is very noticeable. The dark scenes have colour banding issues, and the grains don't look very good either - particularly with mosquito noise around the lines. Considering the blurry background and the abundance of dark scenes, we have slightly increased the strength of denoising and de-banding. PP also includes our routine descale and reconstruction, anti-aliasing and contra-sharpening. Finally, we reconstructed the noise layer to improve the viewing experience.  
  

* * *

title: 有吉のお金発見　突撃！カネオくん　夏休み！お出かけスポットのお金のヒミツＳＰ
description:
有吉のお金発見　突撃！カネオくん　夏休み！お出かけスポットのお金のヒミツＳＰ
[総合] 
2024年08月24日 午後7:30 〜 午後8:52 (1時間22分)

title: [CBM] SSSS.Dynazenon 1-12 Complete (Dual Audio) [BDRip 1080p H.265 10bit]
description:
One day after school, first-year high school student Yomogi Asanaka comes across a starving
man under a bridge. Introducing himself as Gauma, the strange drifter informs Yomogi that he
is a "kaiju user," a person who deals with the "kaiju"—monsters who bring harm to the city and its citizens.

The following evening, Yomogi runs into Gauma and his classmate Yume Minami. Simultaneously,
a kaiju appears in a populated area of the city. Due to Gauma's lack of experience controlling the kaiju,
he brings out a mysterious object from a glowing pouch, summoning a giant robot known as Dynazenon.
Requiring the cooperation of four people, the mecha drags Gauma, Yomogi, Minami, and
Koyomi Yamanaka—an unemployed man who was wandering on the street—into its cockpit.

Their encounter with the kaiju marks the beginning of their entanglement with
kaiju eugenicists—kaiju users who manipulate kaiju with ill intent—and
their efforts toward bringing out the full potential of Dynazenon.

---

VIDEO
- Video Source: BD-J
- Video Codec: H.265/HEVC (10bit)
- Video Resolution: 1920x1080p HD (16:9)
- Video FPS: 23.976

AUDIO
- Codec: Dolby Digital 
- Track 1: English: 5.1 Surround (AC3 640Kbps)
- Track 2: Japanese: 5.1 Surround (AC3 640Kbps)

SUBTITLES
- Track 1: English Signs & Songs (Official Subs: Funimation)
- Track 2: English Subtitles (Official Subs: Funimation)

EXTRAS
- Clean Openings
- Clean Ending
- Full Opening

title: [Koi-Raws] Cardfight！！ Vanguard - DivineZ Season 2 - 06 「無双を凌駕する闘志」 (TX 1920x1080 x264 AAC).mkv
description:
## NOTIFICATION

***

***

For those who have read my Discord announcement, you already know: 
I am developing a new server system to maintain and further develop for everyone. 
To participate in testing this new server system, please be a server contributor by donating to us via [Paypal](http://paypal.me/koi271) (request confirmation via Koi-Raws' personal Discord or notification via Koi-Raws Discord server Raws).

title: [4de] DEAD DEAD DEMONS DEDEDEDE DESTRUCTION - S01E13 (WEB 1080p) [Dual Audio]
description:
## What is this?
The CR release of this show has a ~~nice~~ ~~fine~~ script but it has weird technical issues-- Everything is timed to the dub audio and the script is *full* of linebreaks.
Also, all of the signs are hardsubbed. There are some seriously cool signs that only an official publisher would be able to do (the title cards/location names) and straight up Arial-with-stroke signs.

The script is fully retimed and ~~lightly~~ edited. [Here's a script comparison](https://www.diffchecker.com/PrULBWYP/). The diff doesn't include all of the strange linebreaks that were removed.

All of the Arial signs were dehardsubbed, and the important ones were recreated in ASS.
We also included the dub and a signs track if that's what you're into.

We're planning to keep up with this show as long as CR's timing is distractingly bad.

[MediaInfo](https://pastebin.com/raw/Vkuz1VWF)

## Credits
Translation: Ocean Productions  
Editing/Timing/TS: Henry  
Encode: sgt  
Song TL: chron  
Lyrics: Ridley  
KFX: Zahuczky  
QC: Henry, sgt

title: [Muri] Makeine: Too Many Losing Heroines! - S01E05 (CR WEB-DL 1080p x264 AAC) (Japanese, English Dubs) [Dual-Audio, Multi-Sub] | Make Heroine ga Oosugiru! - 05 | 負けヒロインが多すぎる！- 第 5 話
description:
[![](https://iili.io/dXlz9wB.png)](https://youtu.be/iNeTYYZdDxI)

---

**About**
A dual-audio remux consisting of Crunchyroll's video and audio (untouched), all Crunchyroll subs, restyled and resampled to 1080p English subs with both OP and ED from me (there's a new ending this episode, I subbed it), accurate complete named chapters, all (including missing from VARYG's release) necessary fonts, better default tagging for language preferences, and, of course, a signs & songs track.

I've retained Crunchyroll's Full and Forced subtitle tracks for you, since to resample their signs properly, I had to remove all blur from all of them, so they look a bit worse in my sub track compared to CR's (or better, depending on who you ask).

**Episode**
[「朝雲千早は惑わせる」](https://makeine-anime.com/story/?id=ep05)
[Asagumo Chihaya Is Led Astray](https://thetvdb.com/series/make-heroine-ga-oosugiru/episodes/10535662)

**Video**
WEB-DL / x264 / 8 bit / 1080p / 8000 kbps / CR

**Audio**
#1 Japanese / Advanced Audio Codec Low Complexity (AAC LC) / 2.0 / 44.1 kHz / 128 kbps / CR
#2 English / Advanced Audio Codec Low Complexity (AAC LC) / 2.0 / 44.1 kHz / 128 kbps / CR

**Subtitles**
#1 English / Full / ASS / Muri

#10 Russian / Full / ASS / CR

**Chapters**
Named / Muri

---

[![](https://iili.io/dXcElWb.jpg)](https://iili.io/dM76aCQ.png)

---

**Notice**
The ChromeCDM API is still not working, ToonsHub are still not able to rip dual-audio AMZN rips of Crunchyroll anime, and thus I am still unable to obtain the higher quality audio tracks from Amazon instead of Crunchyroll at the moment, just like last week. Sorry! Oh no... anyways. Hope you enjoy the episode!

title: [Sav1or] Orange (2016) Complete [BD][1080p][AV1][OPUS][Dual-Audio] (オレンジ)
description:
# Orange
---

> The previous S01E10 was missing the English audio track. Apologies for the issue and thanks to all that reported it. We processed it manually and also added several subtitle languages in this new release. - `Sav1or`

[![Cover][cover]](https://thechuunicorner.com/2017/04/24/orange-and-learning-life-lessons/)

## Series

`Sav1or` | Episodes | ![MyAnimeList][mal-logo] MyAnimeList | ![TVDB][tvdb-logo] TVDB | ![Nyaa][nyaa-logo] Source
--- | --- | --- | --- | ---
**Season 1** | 13 *(S01E01-S01E13)* | [**Orange**](https://myanimelist.net/anime/32729 "Orange") | [**Orange**](https://www.thetvdb.com/series/orange-2016/seasons/official/1 "Orange") | [动漫国字幕组&VCB-Studio][source-vcb], [MK][source-mk], [Crunchyroll][source-kitsune], [hazylum][source-hazy], [Sharigan613][source-bn], [mochioka][source-vi]
**Movie** | 1 *(S00E01)* | [**Orange: Mirai**](https://myanimelist.net/anime/34136 "Orange: Mirai") | [**Orange: Future**](https://www.thetvdb.com/series/orange-2016/episodes/5775168 "Orange: Future") | [动漫国字幕组&VCB-Studio][source-vcb], [-__-'][source-mr], [s_ahmed8553][source-ar-movie]

---
## Release

A complete Dual-Audio release encoded in AV1 and OPUS for optimum size and quality. Files are named to support media servers like Plex using TVDB metadata.

Note: Orange: Mirai, S00E01, only contains subtitles in AR and EN.

`Sav1or` | Codec | Quality | Language | Notes
--- | --- | --- | --- | ---
**Video** | AV1 | 1080p 10-bit
**Audio** | OPUS | Stereo (2.0) 96K, Stereo (2.0) 64K | Japanese, English | Japanese Commentary Stereo 64K
**Subtitle** | ASS | *high* | Japanese, Arabic, Bengali, Chinese (Traditional), Chinese (Simplified), English, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, Spanish, Vietnamese | Signs & Songs, Dialogue, SDH
**Chapter** || *yes*

**Encoding Details**:

SVT-AV1-Psy 2.1.0-A with Av1an (`--photon-noise 2`)
```
--preset 4 --crf 28 --aq-mode 2 --keyint 0 --tune 3 --enable-tf 0 --variance-boost-strength 2 --variance-octile 6 --enable-dlf 2 --qm-min 0 --qp-scale-compress-strength 3 --sharpness 2
```

> This project is a production with the goal of the smallest video size with moderate subjective compromises to image quality. This is not the hallmark of AV1, but close enough. This release should only contain changes to the video stream and audio tracks. The subtitle and attachment tracks are usually copied from the noted sources. Timings are not adjusted except in cases of extreme delay as a result of mixing sources. - `Sav1or`

### [**Comparisons**](https://slow.pics/c/d2Gk6Bmu "S01E01")

The header above links to a comparison of S01E01 between the [JPBD][comp-cruc], the same JPBD rescaled, and our resulting AV1. Below are a couple of comparisons between the [JPBD][comp-cruc] and our AV1.

[JPBD][comp-cruc] | AV1
:-: | :-:
[![](https://i.slow.pics/YEHfdT9l.webp "Comparison 15: JPBD")](https://i.slow.pics/YEHfdT9l.webp) | [![](https://i.slow.pics/VPGXkzUk.webp "Comparison 15: AV1")](https://i.slow.pics/VPGXkzUk.webp)
[![](https://i.slow.pics/T6Bkb3jq.webp "Comparison 17: JPBD")](https://i.slow.pics/T6Bkb3jq.webp) | [![](https://i.slow.pics/XDXG8UxM.webp "Comparison 17: AV1")](https://i.slow.pics/XDXG8UxM.webp)

![AV1 Logo][av1-logo]

title: [N A F] Tenkousei [PT-BR][DVD]

![alt text](https://imgur.com/gG9W0jQ.jpg "Logo Title Text 1")

Sinopse: O herói é um "aluno comum", Tsukui Shinichi, agora em seu último ano. Uma amiga de infância perdida, Ayase Aoi, se muda na casa ao lado e se transfere para sua escola. Shinichi não consegue se lembrar de Aoi, o que a perturba um pouco. Sua boa aparência atrai a atenção do amigo cômico de Shinichi, Yamashita Satoshi, e o playboy da escola, Kanzaki Kotoro. Enquanto Shinichi e Aoi encaminham para um relacionamento potencial, Shinichi cruza caminhos e, em seguida, as camas de outras estudantes, incluindo uma garota genki desajeitada, Fujiro Mami; uma vamp agressiva, Ebina Mika; E a presidente do clube de arranjo de flores, Hayama Reiko, antes de finalmente terminar nos braços do seu amor verdadeiro.

[![https://i4.imageban.ru/out/2024/07/06/2277d6137784821dac3f5fe94f4785a9.jpg](https://i4.imageban.ru/out/2024/07/06/2277d6137784821dac3f5fe94f4785a9.jpg)](https://www.elyase-anime.com/)


***

**Elf-san wa Yaserarenai | エルフさんは痩せられない. | Plus-Sized Elf | Эльф не может похудеть [ТВ-1]** 

***

**Год выхода:** 2024
**Жанр:** комедия, повседневность
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 12 эп. по ~ 00:22:00
**Количество серий:** 08 из 12
**Дата выпуска:** c 06.07.2024
**Производство:** Япония, студия [Elias](https://myanimelist.net/anime/producer/2928/Elias)
**Снято по манге:** [Эльф не может похудеть](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=6147)
**Автор оригинала:** [Синекдоха](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=929618)
**Режиссер:** [Токоро Тосикацу](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=26514)
**Ссылки:** [World-Art](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/animation.php?id=11985), [ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=31557), [AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/18412), [MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/57845)

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (дублированный) | [Deep](https://vk.com/ruanime)
**Субтитры:** Русские 

**Описание:**
Молодой диетолог и массажист Томоацу Наоэ принимает клиентку из альтернативного мира – красивую эльфийку «плюс-сайз» Элфуду, решившую скинуть вес. Иначе она не сможет вернуться домой через волшебный портал. Перед Элфудой стоит почти непреодолимое препятствие – картошка фри, которую она считает пищей богов. Терпеливый Наоэ объясняет ей принципы похудения, но из-за любимого фастфуда его подопечная ходит по кругу. А тут ещё подтягиваются и другие сказочные существа...
Весёлое фэнтези-аниме о волшебстве и диетах на основе одноимённой манги. 

**Качество видео:** WEBRip IVI.ru (Uncensored) 18+
**Формат:** mkv
**Видео кодек:** x264
**Аудио кодек:** AAC
**Видео:** AVC (High@L4), 1920x1080 (16:9), 25 fps, ~5.1 Mb/s
**Аудио 1:** AAC, 48.0 KHz, 256 kbps, 2 ch (Русский, Deep)
**Аудио 2:** AAC, 48.0 KHz, 256 kbps, 2 ch  (Японский, Elias)




**Скриншоты:**
[![imageban](https://i8.imageban.ru/thumbs/2024.07.06/78409abe72048676baf55d203cf695f7.png)](https://imageban.ru/show/2024/07/06/78409abe72048676baf55d203cf695f7/png)[![imageban](https://i7.imageban.ru/thumbs/2024.07.06/e312db86151a87db633ff275082d0bc2.png)](https://imageban.ru/show/2024/07/06/e312db86151a87db633ff275082d0bc2/png)[![imageban](https://i1.imageban.ru/thumbs/2024.07.06/fc9f30140a2a0e895439183e69f221fe.png)](https://imageban.ru/show/2024/07/06/fc9f30140a2a0e895439183e69f221fe/png)[![imageban](https://i5.imageban.ru/thumbs/2024.07.06/4fbbc493e6d3dfc42133ac5947042b78.png)](https://imageban.ru/show/2024/07/06/4fbbc493e6d3dfc42133ac5947042b78/png)

----------

**Эпизоды:**
01. Эльфийка из Леса / Эльфуда
02. Тёмная эльфийка и прекрасный цветок / Куроэда
03. Жар огра и зелёная чешуя / Мэро
04. Благородная собака и плавающая свинка / Лайка
05. Императрица парка и дух ночного дожора / Кобо
06. Воспоминания костей и снежная дракониха / Хонэда
07. Картошка позора и кулачищи гиганта / Хитомэ
08. Пришельцы из другого мира и горячие позы / Конда
09. ***
10. ***
11. ***
12. ***


**Команда актеров дубляжа и переводчиков русской версии:**
у Deep: Озвучивание: Алёна Андронова — Эльфуда, Анна Горкина — Куроэда, Данил Зимин — Наоэ, Екатерина Тихомирова — Ога, Голем, Ино, Хонэда, Таисия Тришина — Кусаханада, Мэро, Лайкасоб, Хитомэ, Михаил Филиппов — Рыбник, Анастасия Филимонова — Лайка, Сатиро, Конда, Татьяна Литвинова — Кобо, Оку


**Дополнительная информация:**
Ну что товарищи перед нам [s]Петя Гриль[/s] аниме 13 минуточковое - пол серии будут показывать фансервис, пол серии будем лопать фастфуд и заниматься спортом в виде чибиков. Чиби спортивные занятия к серии будут выходить у Deep с небольшой задержкой. По субботам будет версия про фансервис на 13 минут а потом будут добавлять чибиков и серия

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- These volumes start with **right-side page** first (no inner cover page), start with **two** pages on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- All image filenames are tagged and are having page numbers according to the ToC.
- Volume 3 raws are pretty bad with having a huge website watermark at the center, but I have still included them as extras...

----

Volumes 01-03 contain chapters 001-028.
Chapters 001-032 only: https://nyaa.si/view/1864119

title: [neoDESU] The Devil Is a Part-Timer! [Season 2 + Special] [BD 1080p x265 HEVC OPUS] [Dual Audio] Hataraku Maou-sama!!
description:
![](https://i.lensdump.com/i/6BKULK.png)
*Come hang out in **[Discord](https://discord.gg/47Q7FdB54e)***

#### **[The Devil is a Part-Timer! [Season 2 Part 1]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/48413/Hataraku_Maou-sama)**
#### **[The Devil is a Part-Timer! [Season 2 Part 2]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/53200/Hataraku_Maou-sama_2nd_Season)**
#### **[The Devil is a Part-Timer! Season 2: Recap Special From Sasazuka to Ente Isla! [Special]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/55878/Hataraku_Maou-sama_Recap)**

---

**Notes:**
. Part 1 (EP 1-12) is the same as in my previous upload
. Special is [Single Audio]
. Restyled special to match the season and inserted ED
. Small adjustments on signs on the special

---

**Synopsis**
The once-feared Demon Lord Satan of Ente Isla, who had to flee to Earth after being defeated by the hero Emilia Justinia, is now leading a peaceful life in Tokyo under the alias Sadao Maou. Having become a model employee of a local fast-food restaurant, Sadao has to provide for his former generals Alciel and Lucifer who joined him in Japan, as well as avoid confrontations with Emi Yusa—the assumed name of Emilia—and the angels who monitor his actions.

Amidst a violent argument between Sadao and Emi, a dimensional portal suddenly appears, carrying a mysterious apple that harbors a toddler named Alas Ramus. To everyone's bewilderment, she imprints on Emi and Sadao, marking them as her parents! After Emi reluctantly agrees to help Sadao take care of Alas Ramus, their semblance of normal life is jeopardized by the appearance of the archangel Gabriel, who comes bearing bad news. He claims that he must take both Alas Ramus and Emi's sacred sword with him—lest the world be destroyed.

Unable to accept Gabriel's grim prophecies, the hero and the former Demon Lord need to put their differences aside and unite to protect what they hold dearest.

![](https://c.l3n.co/i/V1ZbiP.png)

---

**Language Options**
I included two simple scripts that you can apply to these files to do the following (Windows only):

1. Make [Single Audio] Japanese: Throws out *English audio* and *Signs&Songs subtitles* tracks
2. Make [Single Audio] English: Throws out *Japanese audio* and *Dialogue subtitles* tracks
	
To apply these put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the .bat file. 
*Don't combine them and only use them once together with the base files.*

title: チコちゃんに叱られる！▽のど自慢の鐘▽呼吸の謎▽観光地の写真の不思議 2024年08月23日
description:
チコちゃんに叱られる！▽のど自慢の鐘▽呼吸の謎▽観光地の写真の不思議
[総合] 
2024年08月23日 午後7:57 〜 午後8:42 (45分)
今回のチコちゃんの疑問は…のど自慢で鐘を鳴らすのはなぜ？なぜ私たちはひっきりなしに息をする？観光地で撮った写真はなぜみんな同じになってしまう？わかりますか？

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/vxspYif.png "チコちゃんに叱られる！▽のど自慢の鐘▽呼吸の謎▽観光地の写真の不思議")

	のど自慢で鐘を鳴らすのはなぜ？…ＮＨＫのど自慢の舞台裏に密着！鐘を鳴らすようになったまさかの理由とは！？なぜ私たちはひっきりなしに息をする？…呼吸をする生き物にとっての宿命誕生の秘密とは！？観光地で撮った写真はなぜみんな同じになってしまう？…過去の旅行と現代の旅行の大きな違いがその背景に！？キョエちゃんおススメの夏休み自由研究とは！？ゲストは小林幸子さんと木戸大聖さん！

title: [VCB-Studio] 从Lv2开始开外挂的前勇者候补过着悠哉异世界生活 / Lv2 kara Cheat datta Motoyuusha Kouho no Mattari Isekai Life 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [Fin]
description:
![](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/08/24/lv2_cheat_800.webp)  
  
从Lv2开始开外挂的前勇者候补过着悠哉异世界生活 BDRip  
Lv2 kara Cheat datta Motoyuusha Kouho no Mattari Isekai Life BDRip  
Lv2からチートだった元勇者候補のまったり異世界ライフ BDRip  
  
部分剧集内封评论音轨。  
Some episodes contain commentary tracks.  
  
原盘画质不错，原生分辨率 900p。全片噪点略多，部分场景有色带。线条锐度略不足，有轻微的锯齿。处理上就是常规的逆向拉升重构、抗锯齿、去色带、补偿性锐化、自适应降噪。最后两集部分场景有大量粒子特效，导致画面严重欠码，我们使用神经网络算法针对性处理了这些场景。  
The Blu-ray quality is decent, with a native resolution of 900p. The series has some noticeable noise, and there is colour banding in certain scenes, too. The lines can be a bit sharper, and have slight aliasing issue. PP includes routine descaling and reconstruction, anti-aliasing, de-banding, contra-sharpening, and adaptive denoising. The last two episodes are rich in particle effects, which consequently creates artifacts due to insufficient bitrate. We applied neural-network-based algorithms to fix these scenes.  
  

* * *

![dpcp](https://i.ibb.co/dMCDkyc/ji-zhang-dpcq-ing.jpg)

**Description According to [MAL](https://myanimelist.net/anime/36491/Doupo_Cangqiong)**

>The Great Continent of Combat Qi is a place where the strong rule over the weak. Xiao Yan, a once up and coming genius of the Xiao Sect, suddenly lost all his talent at the tender age of 11. Now a 15-year-old boy, Xiao Yan is scorned by the very people who previously looked up to him, and is on the verge of being kicked out of his clan. To make matters worse, his fiancée, Na Lan Yan Ran, asks for an annulment of their engagement. Xiao Yan makes a solemn vow to himself, a vow to be "trash" no more and to obtain the strength to become the master of his own fate.
>
>An intricate tale of hope and despair, Doupo Cangqiong chronicles the story of a fallen prodigy who sets off on a perilous journey to obtain power, and ascend to the peak of Cultivation.

**Mediainfo** 
Video | Subs | Encoder
--- | --- | ---
FSP| FSP| Paradise_Zero

***WHAT ARE EFC ARCHIVES?***
>Edited For Content archives are all MKV format and have removed all intro and exit music (except Episode 001 of each season is left unedited for fans of that music).
>
>Also removed are food adverts, drink adverts, little figurines of anime characters adverts, Station Identification, Production House Logos, future episode previews and previous episode recaps.  All this digital EXCESS is REMOVED so the ACTUAL STORY can come through WITHOUT all the background noise and fast forwarding interruptions.
>
>EFC archives are structured such that you can watch hours and hours of uninterrupted anime or donghua.  EFC always focuses on bringing the story to the front and leave all the waste out.

title: [Himawari] Boruto - 231-255
description:
This is the arc everyone wanted right? The really popular one? XD Just releasing this because it's actually releasable, it's not too bad, enjoy. :P

Xirix : Editing, Timing, Typesetting, QC, K-Timing (Ending 20)
SuperDown : Encoding
ywai1659 : KFX (Opening 10/Ending 19)
arvon2 : QC, Moral Support
Shinon : Song styling (Ending 20)

So, an update on the BD progress. All timing and editing, as well as standard typesetting. (Like episode names etc) are all finished. Yes, every episode. And in about 2 weeks this will also be true of the final BD set, I'm grinding my way through it.

What's left to do is what's stalling us, I'm not very good at typesetting, and although I am practicing, it's going to be very slow if nobody wants to help out.

Song-wise, I am going to be slowly K-Timing all of them since I now know how to do that, so if anyone wants to help out with the styles, and any KFX to go on top, please let me know, here is a list of the songs not currently done.

Endings :
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Laika
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Polaris
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Tsuyogari_LOSER
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Ride_or_Die
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/The_Incomplete_Lights
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Fireworks
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Maybe_I
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Bib%C5%8Droku
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Ladder
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/See_You

Openings:
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Lonely_Go!
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Golden_Time
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Kirarirari
https://naruto.fandom.com/wiki/Karma_(song)

If you want to contact me about helping out, I'm mostly on discord under Xirix. (I'm in GJM, Hatsuyuki, Damedesuyo and Some-Stuff's discords, so you don't even need to send a friend request if you're also in those) Or leave a comment below on how to contact you if you don't do discord.

I am intent on getting this project done, but like I say, the time between releases is going to be dramatically different if we don't get any new blood in.

title: My Adventurer Life: I Became the Strongest Magic-Refining Sage in a New World 001-029 as v01-07 (Digital-Compilation) (Square Enix) (Oak)
description:
**These are the digital store chapters released by Square Enix outside the Manga UP! App -- therefore these are tagged with (Square Enix).**
Chapters provided by DigitalMangaFan, denoised, grayscaled, and lossless optimized x2231 **PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged and fixed where needed.

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- These volumes start with **right-side page** first (no inner cover page), start with **two** pages on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- All image filenames are tagged and are having page numbers according to the ToC.

**Fixed: Volumes 01-06 are redone with better raws, extras and omakes are still untranslated.**

----

Volumes 01-07 contain chapters 001-029.

title: Reto the Protector 001-015 as v01-03 (Digital-Compilation) (Oak)
description:
Obtained directly from [Manga UP! Global](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/390).
[Converted and denoised](https://pastebin.com/ZeY9fqxW) x3100 **4-bit (16 Colors) PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.

*This compiled volume includes raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- This volume starts with **right-side page** first (no inner cover page), start with **two** pages on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- All image filenames are tagged and are having page numbers according to the ToC.

----

Volumes 01-03 contain chapters 001-015.
Chapters 001-015 only: https://nyaa.si/view/1863868

title: [SubsPlus+] Dungeon People - S01E07 (AMZN WEB 1080p AVC EAC3) | Dungeon no Naka no Hito
description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.*
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

| [MediaInfo](https://rentry.co/igewmued/raw) | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Amazon Hidive Channel (AVC) via Erai-raws    |
| Audio     | Amazon Hidive Channel (EAC3) via Erai-raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | Automatic  |

> Fansub recommendation if you can wait: **Chihiro**

---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

**Описание:**
Тока — обычный незаметный парень, которого все принимают за пустое место. Однажды его вместе с одноклассниками переносит в другой мир, но и там ничего не меняется! Все его товарищи получают сильные навыки, только Тока оказывается ни к чему не годным, и богиня Вишис ссылает его в древние развалины. Но там оказывается, что навыки Токи не такие уж никчёмные. Теперь он клянётся отомстить богине и раскрывает свой истинный характер.
